case_title: Garante / ChatGPT urgent provisional limitation matter
strongest_supportable_claim_now: LIMEN can state that the Italian DPA issued an urgent provisional limitation order and can cite the concerns listed in the regulator-hosted order text.
overread_to_avoid: Do not generalize the order into a final merits judgment, pan-EU legal conclusion, or broad compliance finding beyond the order text.
stronger_document_that_changes_ceiling: Human-reviewed anchor extraction from the Italian order text for article-ready claim-support rows.
paper_thesis_use: Benchmark document-complete regulator row for methods and hostile-reviewer comparison.

case_title: EEOC / iTutorGroup automated hiring discrimination matter
best_public_record_now: EEOC filing press release plus EEOC settlement/decree press release
strongest_supportable_claim_now: LIMEN can state that the EEOC publicly said it filed suit in EDNY Civil Action No. 1:22-cv-02565 and later publicly described settlement/decree terms, but the package still lacks a captured court-facing complaint, decree, or order text.
overread_to_avoid: Do not treat agency allegations as court-verified complaint text or treat the agency settlement summary as a full judicial merits finding.
stronger_document_that_changes_ceiling: Open complaint, consent decree, docket entry, or judicial order from a public court-facing source or clearly labeled open mirror.
paper_thesis_use: High-value U.S. escalation row for showing the difference between agency-summary progression and true court-document anchoring.

case_title: ICO / Serco Leisure biometric attendance enforcement matter
strongest_supportable_claim_now: LIMEN can cite the direct ICO enforcement notice for legal basis, cited UK GDPR provisions, attendance-monitoring posture, and remedy steps including cessation and destruction requirements.
overread_to_avoid: Do not extrapolate from one notice to broad sector prevalence, wider legality conclusions, or adjudicated facts beyond the notice text.
stronger_document_that_changes_ceiling: Selective anchor extraction of the most publication-useful notice clauses and remedy terms.
paper_thesis_use: Document-grade regulator/public-record exemplar for biometric workplace enforcement tables.

case_title: ICO / Chelmer Valley High School facial-recognition reprimand matter
strongest_supportable_claim_now: LIMEN can cite the direct ICO reprimand for the Article 35(1) DPIA failure, March 2023 deployment timing, and invalid opt-out consent framing.
overread_to_avoid: Do not generalize from this school-specific reprimand to sector-wide prevalence or broader legality findings beyond the reprimand text.
stronger_document_that_changes_ceiling: Selective anchor extraction with student-context caution preserved.
paper_thesis_use: Document-grade minors/public-interest governance exemplar with direct reprimand text.

best_public_record_now: DOJ press release plus DOJ-linked indictment PDF
strongest_supportable_claim_now: LIMEN can state that DOJ announced indictment-stage charges and that an official DOJ-linked indictment PDF is publicly captured, but the strongest wording should still come from the DOJ summary because exact caption/case-number fields are not yet normalized from the PDF text layer.
overread_to_avoid: Do not present the matter as adjudicated fact, do not invent exact caption/case-number fields from a non-extracted PDF, and do not blur accusation-stage posture into a final fraud finding.
stronger_document_that_changes_ceiling: OCR-normalized or otherwise text-extracted indictment caption block with exact case-number and filing metadata.
paper_thesis_use: Useful methods/limitations row showing that some court-family upgrades are compute-bound normalization problems rather than discovery failures.
